name: Touta Konoe
description: Number 7 of UQ Holder's immortal squad, Numbers. Touta is a cheerful and optimistic 14 year old boy with many dreams. He was raised by Yukihime after his parents died. After being mortally wounded while protecting Yukihime, he drinks her blood and is transformed into an immortal vampire. His weapon is the Gravity Blade, a sword that can have its weight increased or decreased thousands of timesfold according to the will of its user (actually a adjustable dial). His grandfather was Negi Springfiel

name: Xue Lan Liu
description: Xue Lan Liu is an assassin. She is known as Untouchable because of her strength, and the fact that she is the number 1 ranked player in Japan.

name: Yan Su
description: __Species:__ Human (Phoenix Cultivation Bloodline) __Body Type:__ Ice Crystal Jade Body Su Yan was an elite disciple of High Heaven Pavilion when Yang Kai was still at the rank of trial-disciple. She eventually marries Yang Kai to become his first wife, and then becomes a follower of Yang Kai's High Heaven Palace in the upper realm. ~! Later on in the story She, along with Yang Kai, wins the Cave Inheritance of the Dragon Emperor and Phoenix Empress. However accepting this inheritance requires t

name: Yousuke Hirata
description: __Height:__ 174 cm (5'8") The social leader of the D class. He has excellent academic and athletic ability, and is considered extremely handsome by his classmates, he is shown to be extremely compassionate and puts others before himself, considering everybody equal. He is considered a perfect male student and his placement in the D-class is originally considered a mystery.

name: Yukinori Shinohara
description: A Special Class Ghoul Investigator. In the past, he acted as Koutarou Amon's instructor at the Academy.

name: Yumiko Miura
description: She is [Hikki](https://anilist.co/character/67065) and [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/67069)'s classmate who is very popular in Class 2-F, as well as the main female figure in [Hayato Hayama](https://anilist.co/character/79591/Hayato-Hayama)'s clique. Yumiko's personality is pompous. Due to her popularity, she is held in highest hierarchy. Hence, she has no trouble making friends and also has little to no understanding towards people who have social troubles. Yumiko doesn't show interest, or

name: Yuuma  Nosaka
description: Nosaka Yuuma (野坂のさか 悠馬ゆうま) is one of the three protagonists in Inazuma Eleven Ares no Tenbin, along with Haizaki Ryouhei and Inamori Asuto. He's a forward and captain for Outei Tsukinomiya. Later, he plays as a midfielder and becomes the secondary captain for Inazuma Japan in Inazuma Eleven Orion no Kokuin.

name: Ziyun Ye
description: __Race:__ Human __Soul Realm:__ Cyan One of the students in the fighter apprentice class with Nie Li, very few know her background. She is a member of the strongest family in Glory City, Snow Wind Family. Her grandfather is the legend rank demon spiritualist Ye Mo, and her father, Ye Zong, is the current City Lord. name: Aichi Sendou
description: Aichi Sendou is the main protagonist of the Cardfight Vanguard anime and manga. He is a somewhat shy and timid young man who wishes to be a Vanguard Fighter, but has never had the chance to have a real fight until his second encounter with Kai. When starting to play Vanguard, he believes more in himself, becoming a powerful Vanguard Fighter. His Vanguard Circle's color is blue; but when using a Shadow Paladin deck, the color changes to dark blue. (Source: Cardfight!! Vanguard Wiki)

name: Atra Mixta
description: Atra is the cook for Tekkadan. She has a close relationship with Kudelia Aina Bernstein and Mikazuki Augus whom she has a crush on. ~!In season 2 of Iron-Blooded Orphans, Mikazuki and Atra conceive a baby together!~

name: Bloster
description: Bloster is a lobster-based Chimera Ant and former Squadron Leader.

nativeName: シャルロット＝ヘイゼルリンク
description: The princess of Hazelrink Principality, whom Teppei first meets and saves from a carriage incident involving thugs. She likes to tease Teppei and has a cheery nature.

name: Chouchou
description: Chouchou is a very loyal dog, protecting his master's pet shop with his own life, and refusing to move from the spot despite the danger. He also assisted the Straw Hat Pirates in escaping from the townspeople who misunderstood their intentions, as being grateful for helping him. (Source: One Piece Wikia)

name: Dan-I Ham
description: Ham Dan-I is the main character of My Life as an Internet Novel. On the first day of her middle school life, she finds herself in the world of a web novel, where she is the plain childhood best friend and neighbor of beautiful Ban Yeo-Ryeong. Despite her persisting disbelief, she follows Yeo-Ryeong to Ji Jon Middle School, where she meets the Four Heavenly Kings of Ji Jon. Over time, she becomes actual friends with Ban Yeo-Ryeong and the Four Heavenly Kings. Due to also believing that her friend
mediaTitles: My Life as an Internet Novel

name: Fee Carmichael
description: Fee Carmichael is the American pilot of the "Toy Box", the debris-collecting ship used by the main characters of PlanetES. She was born in Richmond, Virginia, and the daughter of a prominent lawyer. Even more loud and brash than Hachi, Fee often becomes violent at others' actions and inaction, but she always means well. Being a heavy (and slightly ashamed) smoker, she has difficulty finding places to indulge her habit in space, as smoking is a strain on life support systems and is thereby restri

name: Gomamon
description: Gomamon first appeared when he digivolved from Pukamon to protect Jou from Kuwagamon in episode one of Digimon Adventure. He is Jou's partner and his goal is to lighten Jou up and make him less serious.

name: Igor
description: A mysterious, long-nosed gentleman who resides in the Velvet Room. As in the other Persona games, Igor's purpose is to assist the player in acquiring new powers and Persona. At the end of the game, because the Main Character has fulfilled his contract, Igor uses the power of the Main Character's social links to forge a Persona of the World Arcana with the power to change reality. Igor states that he had never thought to see such power during his lifetime. He also makes an appearance in the anime
mediaTitles: Persona 3 the Movie: #1 Spring of Birth
searchTerms: Persona 3 the Movie: #1 Spring of Birth

name: Jun Sekibayashi
description: Sekibayashi Jun, also known as Hell's Angel, is a famous Super Japan Pro Wrestler as well as an affiliated fighter within the Kengan matches. He represented Gandai in the Kengan Annihilation Tournament. Jun is a proud professional wrestler who takes his occupation very seriously, maintaining that as a wrestler it is his responsibility to tank any and all damage that comes his way. To that end, he fights with entertaining the audience as his first goal and defeating his opponent the second. While

name: Kanon Oikawa
description: She was diagnosed with Sensorineural hearing loss when she was five years old. She isn't entirely deaf; if she has a hearing aid, the room is quiet, and she can see the other person's lips, she can hold on a conversation.

name: Kaoru Ijuuin
description: He is a childhood friend of Tada and also a member of the photography club. If he doesn't open his mouth, he actually is quite handsome but sadly he can never keep it shut long enough to fool anyone. He is due to take over his family's famous restaurant in Ginza, so he is very good at cooking. When they were small, Tada saved him from a dangerous situation so he thinks of Tada as his one and only friend. Because he often spends his days at the Tada Coffee Shop, he is also good friends with Grand

name: Kasane Randall
description: __Suppression Force Division:__ 567th Class __ID:__ RRK567301 __Height:__ 161 cm __Power:__ Psychokinesis __Weapon:__ Throwing Knives A girl who appears to be cool, pragmatic, and who acts indifferently to others but has unparalleled sense of battle. name: Keita Ooba
description: He was a member of an idol group and also acted in some movies. He disappeared during the event of 8/31. When she was younger, Kadode was obsessed with him. ~!His body was taken over by an invader child during the 8/31 event and ever since he has been living as an invader in the human body.!~

name: Kirisame
description: Kirisame is one of the two strongest warriors in the Petrification Kingdom, the other being [Mozu](https://anilist.co/character/157298).
